questions.text: True or False: Direct flows can only be shipped after quality controls are fully completed and closed in the factory.
options: False. Direct flow allows shipping before quality control is finalized, which is the exception to the standard process.

questions.text: What stock type is always used for items in the inbound delivery within the Direct Flow process?
Where can the date of quality release for a batch be found in NEO?
What action in NEO automatically triggers a quality inspection lot creation?
